urls.title: The n8n Forum is where our community comes together to ask questions, collaborate, share workflows, and help each other out. If you enjoy helping others, you can also take part in our Answer & Earn… | n8n
urls.description: The n8n Forum is where our community comes together to ask questions, collaborate, share workflows, and help each other out. If you enjoy helping others, you can also take part in our Answer & Earn program. When your answer is marked as a solution, you earn points on the leaderboard. Each month the top contributors receive cash prizes, n8n Cloud credits, and community recognition. A big thank you to our top supporters from February for helping so many others in the community: 🥇 Anshul Namdev → 512 questions answered 🥈 Mohamed Anan → 340 questions answered 🥉 Abdo Almenwer → 329 questions answered Have a question, a workflow to share, or want to help someone else out? Jump into the Forum and join the conversation: https://lnkd.in/dHHkmgmF

data.text:
Your AI skills are worthless.

I've seen builders with perfect n8n workflows and zero clients.

Meanwhile someone with half the skill closes $6K in 2 weeks.

Difference? A brutal client acquisition system.

Here's the 5-step pipeline I use: 🧵 https://t.co/n9JcyocdqY

You need to:
• Learn Claude Code
• Build 1–2 workflows in Cowork
• Optimize Cowork (plugins + skills)
• Set up OpenClaw
• Use AI to create a business plan
• Build an AI second brain (Notion)
• Try Notion Agents
• Learn automation (MCPs, Zapier, n8n)
• Learn prompt eng

RAG -> LangChain
Multi-agent -> CrewAI
Code gen -> AutoGen
No-code -> Dify
Automation -> n8n

#AIAgents #LangChain #LLM

The only AI tool list you actually need in 2026:

For content: ChatGPT/ Claude AI+ Canva AI
For client work: n8n + Airtable
For automation: Zapier or n8n
For knowledge products: Notion AI + Selar
For chatbots: n8n + Gemini

Master one category at a time.

「n8nって何がいいの？」
Makeと迷ってる人向けに整理すると👇
Make：直感的なUI、初心者向き、無料枠あり
n8n：セルフホストできる、制限なし、AIとの連携が強い
月に1万回以上処理するならn8nの方が圧倒的にコスパが良くなる。
